hero_subtitle: Generous, flame-grilled catering designed for relaxed and memorable outdoor events.
samples_intro: A taste of what we’ve cooked. These are real barbecue menus from real events — from springtime country lunches to corporate days out. Each one is a starting point, not a fixed offering. Tap any menu to expand.
cta_subtitle: Tell us about your event and we will create a menu that works perfectly for you.

samples.title: Spring Countryside Barbecue
samples.blurb: This was the perfect menu for a countryside event. The smell of the meat cooking whetted the appetites, and when guests were called to the tables they seated themselves in record time!

items: Grilled spice rubbed rump of beef
Smoky Moroccan chicken skewers
Lamb & mint burgers with minty Greek yogurt
Grilled halloumi with roasted peppers (V)
Mixed baby leaves with strawberries & a fruit vinaigrette
Jewelled couscous with pomegranate seeds
Lemony chick pea, red pepper and feta salad with parsley & coriander
Puy lentil, roasted pepper, sun-dried tomato & parsley salad
Artisan breads & butter
Baked New York style lime & ginger cheesecake
Chocolate cream tartlets with local strawberries

samples.title: Summer Birthday Barbecue
samples.blurb: It could hardly have been a more perfect day for a birthday barbecue. The sun shone brightly, the garden was full of family and friends, and a certain British tennis player won Wimbledon!

items: Vietnamese lemongrass chicken
Moroccan lamb kebabs
Monkfish, pancetta & rosemary skewers
Portobello mushrooms with a gorgonzola & thyme stuffing (V)
Rocket & mini plum tomato salad with parmesan shavings & a balsamic vinaigrette
New potato, sun-dried tomato & basil salad
Broad bean, pea & feta salad with mint
Black bean, roasted pepper, sweetcorn, coriander & lime salad
Artisan breads & butter
Chocolate oblivion with raspberry coulis
Pavlova with chantilly cream, fresh strawberries & mango coulis

samples.title: Midsummer Staff Party
samples.blurb: A party for staff and their families on the longest day of the year. Tables were set up on the grounds of a manor house. Children ran and played. Adults ate, drank and were merry.

items: Grilled Lincolnshire and Toulouse sausages with caramelised onion relish
¼ pound beef burgers with all the trimmings
Black bean, roasted pepper & coriander burgers (V)
Potato and cucumber salad with red onions & dill
Mixed green salad with a herb vinaigrette
Chick pea, halloumi, tomato, cucumber & mint salad
Stack of gooey chocolate brownies
Summer fruit salad with ice cream

samples.title: Corporate Team Building Day
samples.blurb: It was a departmental day out, doing some volunteer work as a way of giving back to the local community. A morning of gardening and clearing brush was rewarded with a scrumptious barbecue lunch.

items: American style pork ribs with chipotle barbecue sauce
Rosemary & garlic chicken skewers
Local pork sausages with caramelised onion relish
Grilled tuna steaks with pomegranate molasses
Black bean, edamame & brown rice salad with lime & coriander
Grilled halloumi, chick pea, tomato, cucumber & mint salad with lemon dressing
Chorizo, butternut squash and wheatberry salad
Rocket, plum tomatoes and shaved parmesan with a balsamic vinaigrette
Artisan breads & butter
Pavlovas with lemon cream and fresh berries
Baked chocolate tart with mascarpone cream & fresh local raspberries

samples.title: Family Style Barbecue
samples.blurb: A marquee in the garden of the host's family home, on the edge of the Cotswolds. Huge trees, flower beds, and a gathering of friends and family from far & wide. Guests milled on the lawn before the ceremony drinking fizz and eating smoked salmon on seeded rye bread.

items: Spice rubbed grilled rump of beef served on a bed of rocket
Smoky lemon & harissa chicken skewers
Butternut squash, chick pea & spinach tagine (V)
Jewelled couscous with pomegranate seeds
Broad bean, pea, cucumber, halloumi & mint salad
Roasted beetroot, puy lentil, feta & mint salad
Assorted baklava with honeyed Greek yogurt
Mugs of potato & leek soup with crusty breads
